zh.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville於1320年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登。她於大約1334年與William Greville在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1373年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville于1320年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登。她于大约1334年与William Greville在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾其皮三 坎普登结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1373年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Neuville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French, Walloon, and Flemish: habitational name from (La) Neuville, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France and in Belgium (Wallonia and Flanders), ultimately derived from Latin nova villa ‘new country house, estate’ (later, ‘new settlement/village/town’). Compare Newville .

variants.name: Newville
meanings: Americanized form of French, Walloon, and Flemish   Neuville  .
Possibly also Irish and English: variant of   Neville  .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

en.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville was born in 1320, in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She married William Greville about 1334, in Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1373, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville est née en 1320, à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William Greville environ 1334, à Chipping Campden, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1373, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Neuvilleは1320年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンで生まれた。約1334年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチップイング カンプデンでWilliam Grevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1373年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville(은)는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 치핀그 캠p든에서 William Greville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Neuville родилась в 1320 г. в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Greville около 1334 г. в местности чиппинг кампден, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1373 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.
